verified.name: Gemini
verified.tagline: Live crypto ticker prices from the Gemini exchange, no key needed
verified.description: Gemini's public REST endpoints expose real-time market data for its cryptocurrency pairs without any authentication. The pubticker route returns the current bid, ask, last trade, and rolling 24h volume for a symbol like BTC/USD. Handy for quick price widgets and lightweight trading tools.
verified.freeTier: Public market data endpoints are keyless and free
verified.rateLimit: Public API throttled per IP (specific numeric limit not confirmed at probe time)
verified.notes: CORS header echoed the request Origin rather than returning '*'.

verified.name: Mempool
verified.tagline: Recommended Bitcoin fee rates straight from a mempool explorer
verified.description: Mempool.space runs an open Bitcoin explorer and exposes a keyless REST API over its live mempool. The recommended-fees endpoint returns suggested sat/vB rates for fastest, half-hour, hour, economy, and minimum confirmation targets. Useful for wallets estimating what to pay before broadcasting a transaction.
verified.freeTier: Free public API; no key for basic usage
verified.rateLimit: Enforced — HTTP 429 on excess, repeated abuse may be banned; numeric limits unpublished

verified.name: Economia.Awesome
verified.tagline: Brazilian currency quotes and FX pairs, key optional
verified.description: AwesomeAPI's Economia service serves Brazilian-market currency and FX data via plain GET requests. The last-quote endpoint returns bid, ask, daily high/low, and percent change for a pair such as USD/BRL. Requests work without a key, though responses are briefly cached unless you register.
verified.freeTier: 100,000 requests/month free after registration; keyless access allowed (cached ~1 min)
verified.rateLimit: Unauthenticated sequential queries capped at 100 results; responses cached ~1 min

verified.name: Postman Echo
verified.tagline: Reflects your HTTP request back as JSON for client testing
verified.description: Postman Echo is a hosted sandbox that mirrors whatever you send it. A GET to /get returns the query args, request headers, and full URL as JSON, making it an easy target for verifying HTTP clients, headers, and query handling. No key or signup required.

verified.name: APIs.guru
verified.tagline: A machine-readable directory of public OpenAPI specifications
verified.description: APIs.guru maintains a large, community-curated catalog of OpenAPI/Swagger definitions for public web APIs. The metrics endpoint gives a compact snapshot of the directory: how many specs, APIs, and endpoints are indexed plus counts of unreachable or invalid entries. The full listing is also keyless but large, so metrics is a friendlier sample.
verified.notes: The /v2/list.json endpoint is valid too but ~9 MB and timed out at 8s; metrics.json used as the representative sample.

verified.name: CDNJS
verified.tagline: Version, file and SRI metadata for CDNJS-hosted libraries
verified.description: The CDNJS API returns metadata about the front-end libraries mirrored on the CDN. Querying a library like jquery yields its latest URL, SRI hash, current version, main filename, license, and homepage. Keyless and quick, it's handy for build tools resolving asset URLs.

verified.name: DigitalOcean Status
verified.tagline: Live operational status of DigitalOcean's services
verified.description: DigitalOcean publishes its incident and uptime data through an Atlassian Statuspage public API. The status.json endpoint returns a top-level indicator and human-readable description of overall service health. No key required, ideal for status dashboards and uptime bots.

verified.name: Hipsum
verified.tagline: Hipster-flavored lorem ipsum placeholder text on demand
verified.description: Hipsum generates filler text in an over-the-top hipster vocabulary instead of classic Latin lorem ipsum. A GET returns a JSON array of paragraphs sized by the paras parameter, ready to drop into mockups. No key or signup needed.
sampleJson: Canon event delulu sound bath literally manifesting mubi letterboxd amaro cacio e pepe ennui. Chemex +1 mukbang bruh try-hard. Cacio e pepe semiotics supreme reformer, butter board trust fund hot honey…

verified.name: IPinfo
verified.tagline: Geolocation and network details for any IP address
verified.description: IPinfo returns location and network data for an IP. Hitting /json without a token resolves the caller's own address to city, region, country, coordinates, ASN/org, and timezone. Keyless requests work but are rate-limited; a free token unlocks higher volume.

sampleJson.org: AS34296 Millenicom Telekomunikasyon Hizmetleri Anonim Sirketi

verified.freeTier: Keyless /json works with limits; free token recommended (IPinfo Lite offers higher/unlimited access with a token)
verified.rateLimit: Keyless/unauthenticated access is rate-limited; numeric caps not stated on the developers page
verified.notes: Keyless response includes a 'readme' field pointing to ipinfo.io/missingauth.

skipped.name: CryptingUp
skipped.reason: Abandoned — docs URL redirects to HugeDomains (cryptingup.com is for sale); /api/* paths return the parked HTML page, not JSON.

skipped.name: Solana JSON RPC
skipped.reason: JSON-RPC over POST with a request body; no keyless GET endpoint returning JSON.

skipped.name: ZMOK
skipped.reason: Ethereum JSON-RPC provider requiring signup for a per-app endpoint URL and POST requests; no keyless GET JSON.

skipped.name: Exchangerate.host
skipped.reason: Now requires an access_key — keyless request returns error 101 'missing_access_key'.

skipped.name: Bank of Russia
skipped.reason: Endpoint returns XML (application/xml, windows-1251), not JSON.

skipped.name: Exchangerate.dev
skipped.reason: Requires an API key even on the free tier (Authorization: Bearer on every request); keyless /latest returns 404.

skipped.name: BrewPage
skipped.reason: User-content hosting product with no documented keyless JSON GET API; /api returns HTML.

skipped.name: Changelogs.md
skipped.reason: Domain appears parked/repurposed — API path 404s and root serves an unrelated WordPress ('Host Descuento') page.

skipped.name: Ciprand
skipped.reason: A Go CLI tool / GitHub repo for generating random strings, not a hosted HTTP API.

skipped.name: DomainDb Info
skipped.reason: Now requires an API key — anonymous access disabled, returns HTTP 401 'API key required'.

skipped.name: host-t.com
skipped.reason: DNS-via-HTTP service returns text/HTML (redirects to dnsviahttp.com), not JSON.

skipped.name: HTTP2.Pro
skipped.reason: Endpoint returns an AMP HTML page (Vietnamese), not JSON — domain appears repurposed/parked.

skipped.name: IFTTT
skipped.reason: Connect API requires authentication (service key / IFTTT-Service-Key header); no keyless JSON GET.

skipped.name: isitdownstatus
skipped.reason: No public API — /api 404s and the site is a Next.js front-end with no documented keyless JSON endpoint.
